headline: Staff Software Engineer at EliseAI working around realtime voice and agentic AI
title: Staff Software Engineer
confidenceNote: AI Engineer World's Fair schedule and LinkedIn-style profile results both match Bohan Li/Bo Li at EliseAI as Staff Software Engineer; public details beyond role are limited.
bioMarkdown: Staff Software Engineer at EliseAI, an agentic AI platform for housing and healthcare. Listed on the AI Engineer World's Fair schedule for a talk on realtime voice agents, making him a strong match for conversations about production voice AI, applied agents, and automation-heavy vertical software.

headline: Co-Founder and CTO at DatologyAI, building automated data curation for model training
title: Co-Founder and CTO
confidenceNote: DatologyAI's official team page, LinkedIn, X, and event schedule all align on Bogdan Gaza as DatologyAI co-founder/CTO; location inferred from company footprint rather than a personal primary source.
bioMarkdown: Co-Founder and CTO at DatologyAI, where he works on automated data curation for training better, faster, and smaller AI models. Previously CTO/co-founder of Moonsense, with infrastructure engineering and management experience at Amazon and Twitter.

primary.label: DatologyAI about page
primary.note: Official team page names Bogdan Gaza as Co-Founder, CTO and notes prior Moonsense, Amazon, and Twitter experience.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies Bogdan Gaza as co-founder and CTO at DatologyAI.

primary.label: X profile
primary.note: Profile says co-founder and CTO at DatologyAI.

secondary.label: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 schedule
secondary.note: Lists Bogdan Gaza for a session titled 'Running a 20T-Token Data Pipeline: Infrastructure Lessons from Production.'

secondary.label: Radical Ventures portfolio page
secondary.note: Lists Bogdan Gaza among DatologyAI founders.

headline: Founder and CEO of Ligaments AI Company, focused on enterprise AI foundations and vertical AI platforms
title: CEO
confidenceNote: Role and company are well supported by LinkedIn and company sources; Dallas is user-provided while company headquarters are listed as Prosper, Texas.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Ligaments AI Company, building enterprise AI foundations, composable AI solution stacks, and vertical AI platforms. Useful contact for enterprise AI adoption, telecom/fiber AI workflows, and practical AI systems tied to measurable business outcomes.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies Boominathan Shanmugam as Founder and CEO of Ligaments AI Company focused on enterprise AI foundations and vertical AI platforms.

primary.label: Ligaments AI official site
primary.note: Company describes enterprise-focused AI work including small language models, BYOM architectures, measurable business outcomes, and enablement.

primary.label: Ligaments AI LinkedIn company page
primary.note: Company page lists Boominathan Shanmugam among employees and describes Ligaments AI as an enterprise AI solutions company headquartered in Prosper, Texas.

secondary.label: Boominathan Shanmugam LinkedIn post
secondary.note: Post describes Ligaments.ai work across telecommunications, healthcare, insurance, shipping, and manufacturing, plus NVIDIA Inception participation.

headline: Fractional CTO and advisor for healthtech, fintech, climate, and AI-driven startups
title: Fractional CTO
confidenceNote: Oak & Co, LinkedIn search results, and Health2047/TCGen bios consistently match Brad Taylor as fractional CTO/advisor with prior CTO and fintech leadership roles.
bioMarkdown: Fractional CTO and advisor through Oak & Co, helping founders with technical strategy, engineering leadership, infrastructure, security, and product execution. Former CTO at Galileo Health and Nursa, with earlier leadership work at Marqeta through IPO.

primary.label: Oak & Co official site
primary.note: Brad Taylor's site describes fractional CTO and Head of Product work for founders across healthcare, fintech, and climate tech.
